last_prompt: Add tests for the graph export feature. In cli/src/graph.rs or a test module, add unit tests that: (1) verify `generate_mermaid` produces valid Mermaid syntax for a simple 3-task chain (A → B → C), including the correct flowchart header and arrow syntax, (2) verify `generate_dot` produces valid DOT syntax with digraph header, node definitions, and edge declarations, (3) verify tasks with no dependencies appear as isolated nodes. Run `cargo test` to confirm all tests pass.
